## Goal

One sentence. What does this change accomplish and why?

## Background (optional)

Provide any context needed to understand why this work exists.

Keep this concise and avoid duplicating PLAN.md.

## Scope

**In scope:**

**Out of scope:**

## Dependencies

GitHub issue dependencies, such as `Depends on #N`. Remove if none.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] 

## Decomposition

Recommended sub-tasks or sequencing, if non-trivial. Remove if straightforward.

## Risks

Known risks or dependencies worth flagging before implementation begins. Remove if none.
